content.summary: CarMatch level progression. Linear unlock, currently Level 128. 60-82 cars using 5-7 colors per level. Occasional mystery box obstacles.

CM07.name: current_level_number
CM07.notes: OCR + visual: Level 128 on lobby and gameplay

CM08.name: cars_per_level_range
CM08.notes: Level 128: ~82 cars. Earlier levels likely fewer.

CM09.name: colors_per_level_range
CM09.notes: Level 128 uses 6-7 colors. Earlier levels use fewer.

CM10.name: level_unlock_system
CM10.notes: Sequential: complete one to unlock next

CM11.name: mystery_box_frequency
CM11.notes: Dark box objects observed on board at higher levels

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract level progression design parameters from CarMatch for puzzle genre Design DB
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions for full accuracy
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: First puzzle genre entry in Design DB. CarMatch provides baseline parking-lot puzzle mechanics data.
